'''Jaren's planet''' was a habitable world in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] near [[Molavar/Legends|Molavar]]. It was home to [[Goat/Legends|hoars]] and was sparsely populated with such [[Human/Legends|Human]] settlers as [[Ament]] and [[Jaren]], but had at least one [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]]. The local police force rode [[Swoop/Legends|swoop bikes]]. During his hunt for [[Lycan]], [[Darca Nyl]] crashed onto the world around [[32 BBY/Legends|31.5 BBY]].

The world was unique in that it was considered to be alive and [[Telepathy/Legends|telepathic]]. It amplified people's thoughts emotions and could grant people on its surface visions of their past when they opened their minds to it.
